verses.text: Leitung mi khempeuh aw, Pasian' tungah lungdamna aw ging phasak un
Ama minthan'na sa un la, ama tungah minthan'na pia un
Pasian' tungah thu gen un la, “Nangma bawlnate bangzahta-in dipkuathuai! Na vang lian mahmah ahih manin na mai-ah na galte in nang hong mai-et uh hi
Leitung mi khempeuh in nangmah hong bia uh hi. Amaute in nangmah phatna la hong sak uh a, nangma minphatna la hong sak uh hi,” ci-in gen un
Hong pai un la, Pasian' sepsate mu un. Mite' laka a bawlnate-ah amah dipkuathuai hi
Amah in tuipi tui pen leikeu suaksak a, i pu i pate in a khe uh tawh tua tuipi na kantan uh hi. Tua bangin ama nasepna hangin eite i lungdam hi
Ama thahatna tawh a uk ngitngetpa, ama mit tawh minamte a encik ngitngetpa, mi lehdote in langpan' kei uh hen
Mite aw, a hingte laka a hong kempa, i khe a hong taalsak lopa, eite' Pasian phat un. Amah phatna aw kizasak tawntung un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian aw, kote na hong sin khin a, mei tawh ngun a kisin bangin kote na hong sin khin hi
Nangmah in ngen sungah kote na hong tungsak a, ka nungzang uhah vangikpi na hong suan hi
Ka galte uh nong tuancilsak a, tui leh mei lauhuainate ka thuak uh hi. Ahih hangin nangmah in a tanzau munah kote nong paipih hi
Meihal biaknate tawh nangma inn sungah kei ka hong pai ding hi. Ka lungkham laitakin ka muk pana a gingkhia, ka kama ka thuciamte nangma tungah ka hong pia ding hi
Ganhing thaute tawh meihal biaknate, tuutal-a biakna khute tawh biakna kong pia ding a, bawngtalte leh keelte tawh nangmah biakpiakna ka bawl ding hi
Pasian a zahtakte khempeuh aw, hong pai un la, hong za un. Kei-a' dinga ama bawlsate ka hong gen ding hi
Ama tungah huhna ngenin nakpi takin ka kiko a, lasakna tawh amah ka phat hi
Ka lung sungah mawhna kem leng, Topa in keima thu hong ngailo ding hi
Ahih hangin Pasian in, keima thu hong ngai khin taktak a, keima thungetna aw, hong don khinzo hi
Amah in keima thungetna hong nolhloin, keima kiang panin a itna kip lakhialo ahih manin Pasian in thupha ngah ta hen!
